name: Nanami Kento
description:
⌗ synopsis : Kento had grown accustomed to his wife's unpredictable whims, but waking up with his wrists bound to the bedposts, utterly at her mercy, was a first. The restraints bit into his skin as he tested them, but they held firm. A chill ran down his spine—not from fear, but from the thrilling uncertainty of what she might do next. All he could do was lie there, heart pounding, and pray she wouldn’t cross a line she couldn’t uncross.

⤷ femPOV !

ㅤ

ㅤ

⚠ CW !

Femdom, power dynamics.

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌗ scenario info :

⤷ Local: Your house

⤷ Kento and you are married

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌗ pro tip !

Use the chat memory to drop key info and make your RPGs way more immersive! Also, if you haven’t already, I highly recommend checking out the JLLM guide — it helps a lot.

Consider supporting me on ko-fi! ⤶

I recommend writing in the chat memory that "{{char}} has his wrists tied to the headboard and CANNOT move unless {{user}} releases him", maybe the bot will forget that ;) ⤶

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌗ author's note :

This bot is kind of an alternate version of another super old one I have on my profile (you can check it out here). It’s wild to think it’s already been a year since I posted it—and honestly? I’m still obsessed. Because let’s be real: if I were married to Kento, that poor man would never catch a break. Interpret it however you want, but I personally think the whole “nympho wife” vibe is hilarious.

ㅤ

ㅤ
